title: It's a Girl Pink & White Latex Balloons (30cm) Pack of 5 - Perfect for a Baby Shower, Gender Reveal or Newborn Celebration
features: IT'S A GIRL BALLOONS: Celebrate the arrival of a precious baby girl with these beautiful and high-quality "It's a Girl" pink & white latex balloons, perfect for creating a memorable and joyous atmosphere.

PINK & WHITE DESIGN: The vibrant and eye-catching pink and white color combination of these balloons adds an extra touch of excitement and elegance to your baby shower, gender reveal, or newborn celebration.
PACK OF 5 BALLOONS: A generous pack of 5 "It's a Girl" balloons allows you to decorate your party venue with ease, creating a fun and festive environment to commemorate this special occasion.
PERFECT SIZE: Each balloon measures 30cm in diameter when inflated, providing a substantial and noticeable decoration that will catch the eye of all your guests and leave a lasting impression.

PERFECT FOR VARIOUS OCCASIONS: Whether it's a baby shower, gender reveal party, or a celebration for your newborn, these "It's a Girl" balloons will add a stunning and cheerful touch, making your event even more special and unforgettable.
description: Product Description Create a charming party scene to welcome the new arrival with these Pearlised Latex Pink Baby Shower Balloons. Featuring "It's a Girl" text and a hearts design printed all over, these pink party balloons are ideal for adding decorative bursts of shimmering colour to a girl baby shower or gender reveal party. Arrange them with foil balloons, a balloon weight and curling ribbon to create a dazzling table centrepiece or floor-standing balloon bouquet. Box Contains 1 x Balloons
